title: NITROUS
description: Developed with TypeScript, Fastify, and Next.js, NITROUS is a research project focused on the fundamentals of open-source intelligence (OSINT) through HTTP requests to public APIs.

title: VOLT
description: A full-stack solution for authentication and authorization, built with Fastify, Next.js, and MongoDB, powering a seamless non-KYC crypto card platform.

title: HIVE
description: A full-stack solution for HIVE, a leading bio-link platform, featuring a robust backend and seamless frontend integration using TypeScript, Fastify, Next.js, and MongoDB.
